class.name: VisualShaderNodeGroup
class.brief_description: A visual shader node that instances a [VisualShaderGroup].
class.description: Represents a [VisualShaderGroup] inside a [VisualShader] or another [VisualShaderGroup]. Its input and output ports are defined by the assigned [member group] resource. If the group contains nodes incompatible with the current shader context, the outputs will use default values and a warning will be shown. If the group contains several outputs only the first one will be used.

members.member: The [VisualShaderGroup] resource instanced by this node.
